data.name: ConfirmRecycleBinDontAskAgain
data.value: Don't ask again for Recycle Bin deletes

data.name: ConfirmRecycleBinDontAskAgainAutomationName
data.value: Do not ask again for Recycle Bin deletes

data.name: ConfirmRecycleBinDontAskAgainHelpText
data.value: When checked, future Delete actions move images to the Recycle Bin without this confirmation. You can turn confirmation back on in Settings.

data.name: ConfirmRecycleBinFootnote
data.value: You can restore the file from the Recycle Bin until it is emptied.

data.name: ConfirmRecycleBinMessage
data.value: This keeps the file recoverable, but removes it from the current folder and advances the viewer.

data.name: ConfirmReferenceBoardDetail
data.value: Images and notes are removed from the canvas only. Source files are not changed.

data.name: ConfirmReferenceBoardMessage
data.value: This removes the current board layout from this window. Export first if you need to keep a copy.

data.name: CrashDetailsCopied
data.value: Copied crash details to the clipboard.

data.name: CrashDetailsDescription
data.value: Full details are written to the crash log. Use the buttons below to copy a shareable summary, open the log folder, or open a GitHub issue with the context pre-filled.

data.name: CrashIssueBrowserAndCopyFailed
data.value: Could not open the browser or copy the issue URL.

data.name: CrashIssueBrowserFailedCopied
data.value: Could not open the browser. The issue URL was copied to the clipboard.

data.name: CrashIssueTruncatedMarker
data.value: ...truncated - see crash log for full details...

data.name: CrashLogFolderOpenFailedFormat
data.value: Could not open the log folder: {0}

data.name: LogFolderUnavailable
data.value: The log folder is not available yet.

data.name: ClipboardBusyRetry
data.value: Clipboard is busy. Try again in a moment.

data.name: ResizeDescription
data.value: Add a non-destructive resize operation to edit history.

data.name: ResizeModeLongEdgeDescription
data.value: Set the longest side and preserve the source ratio.

data.name: ResizeModePercentDescription
data.value: Scale both dimensions by a percentage.

data.name: ResizeModeShortEdgeDescription
data.value: Set the shortest side and preserve the source ratio.

data.name: ResizeOpenValidImageError
data.value: Open an image with valid pixel dimensions before resizing.

data.name: ResizeOutputMinimumError
data.value: Resize output must be at least 1 x 1 pixels.

data.name: ResizeOutputTooLargeFormat
data.value: Resize output cannot exceed {0} pixels on either edge.

data.name: ResizePreviewNote
data.value: This records an edit operation only. Use Save a copy to export pixels with the resize applied.

data.name: ResizeReadyStatus
data.value: Ready to add this resize to edit history.

data.name: PerspectiveApplyToEditHistory
data.value: Apply perspective correction to edit history

data.name: PerspectiveDescription
data.value: Drag the four source corners, then add a perspective correction edit.

data.name: PerspectiveDragCornerStatus
data.value: Drag a corner handle or use a keystone nudge.

data.name: PerspectiveMoveCornerBeforeApplying
data.value: Move at least one corner before applying.

data.name: PerspectivePreviewNote
data.value: This records an edit operation only. Use Save a copy to export pixels with the perspective correction applied.

data.name: PerspectiveReadyStatusFormat
data.value: Perspective ready. Output will be {0} x {1} px.

data.name: PerspectiveUnavailableMissingFile
data.value: Perspective unavailable: image file is no longer available.

data.name: EditHistoryDescription
data.value: Inspect sidecar edits, fork virtual copies, and export with provenance.

data.name: EditHistoryInitialStatus
data.value: Open an image to inspect its edit history.

data.name: EditNoOperationsYet
data.value: No edit operations yet. Crop, selection, and adjustment tools will add operations here instead of changing the source file.

data.name: EditNoSidecarYet
data.value: No sidecar exists yet. Future edits will create one.

data.name: EditOperationEnabledExportFormat
data.value: {0} enabled operation{1} will apply when this copy is exported.

data.name: EditOpenImageBeforeChanging
data.value: Open an image before changing edit history.

data.name: EditOpenImageBeforeUsing
data.value: Open an image before using edit history.

data.name: EditSidecarNotWritten
data.value: Sidecar has not been written yet.

data.name: EditToggleSelectedAutomationName
data.value: Enable or disable selected edit operation

data.name: SidecarDisabledOperationNote
data.value: Disabled operations remain in history but are skipped on export.

data.name: AnnotationApplyMissingItem
data.value: Add at least one annotation before applying.

data.name: AnnotationArrowToolStatus
data.value: Arrow: drag from tail to point.

data.name: AnnotationBlurToolStatus
data.value: Blur: drag over a region to redact with blur.

data.name: AnnotationDescription
data.value: Draw markup or redaction regions, then add them to the edit history.

data.name: AnnotationPenToolStatus
data.value: Pen: drag to draw a freehand line.

data.name: AnnotationPixelateToolStatus
data.value: Pixelate: drag over a region to redact with blocks.

data.name: AnnotationReadyStatusFormat
data.value: {0} annotation{1} ready. Press Enter to apply.

data.name: AnnotationStepToolStatus
data.value: Step: click once to place the next numbered callout.

data.name: AnnotationTextToolStatus
data.value: Text: click once to place the current text.

data.name: AnnotationUnavailableMissingFile
data.value: Preview unavailable: image file is no longer available.

data.name: ImageAutomationHelpText
data.value: Use arrow keys to navigate previous / next in folder. Mouse wheel zooms; drag pans; double-click fits. F1 shortcut help.

data.name: OcrTextBoxHelpText
data.value: Selectable OCR text. Drag to highlight text, then press Ctrl+C or use the context menu to copy.

data.name: OcrTextRegionsHelpText
data.value: Select text inside a region, then copy it with Ctrl+C or the text box context menu

data.name: EffectsChooseBeforeApplying
data.value: Choose a preset or move a slider before applying.

data.name: EffectsChoosePresetOrSlider
data.value: Choose a preset or move a slider to preview effects.

data.name: EffectsEditNotice
data.value: This records an edit operation only. Use Save a copy to export pixels with the effects applied.

data.name: EffectsPreviewReadyEnter
data.value: Preview ready. Press Enter to apply.

data.name: EffectsPreviewUnavailableMissingFile
data.value: Preview unavailable: image file is no longer available.

data.name: EffectsSubtitle
data.value: Preview sharpen, noise reduction, and vignette before adding an edit.

data.name: AdjustmentsSubtitle
data.value: Preview levels, curve, and HSL before adding an edit.

data.name: AdjustmentsCurveHint
data.value: Negative softens contrast; positive adds contrast.

data.name: AdjustmentsEditNotice
data.value: This records an edit operation only. Use Save a copy to export pixels with the adjustment applied.

data.name: AdjustmentsPreviewUnavailableMissingFile
data.value: Preview unavailable: image file is no longer available.

data.name: AdjustmentsMoveSliderToPreview
data.value: Move a slider to preview an adjustment.

data.name: AdjustmentsPreviewReadyEnter
data.value: Preview ready. Press Enter to apply.

data.name: ModelManagerSubtitle
data.value: Approved local model files stay under app data. Downloads are manual and SHA-256 verified before future AI tools can use them.

data.name: ModelManagerNoModelSelectedSubtitle
data.value: Select an approved model to inspect its source, hash, local status, and import requirements.

data.name: ModelManagerSecurityNotice
data.value: Images never downloads models automatically. Import only model files you chose from an approved source; mismatched hashes stay disabled.

data.name: ModelManagerSelectBeforeImporting
data.value: Select an approved model before importing.

data.name: ModelManagerSelectBeforeDeleting
data.value: Select a model before deleting local files.

data.name: RecoveryCenterSubtitle
data.value: Review recent moves, quarantines, writebacks, and Recycle Bin actions recorded locally.

data.name: RecoveryCenterEmptyDescription
data.value: Destructive moves, quarantines, writebacks, and Recycle Bin sends will appear here after they are recorded.

data.name: RecoveryCenterNoRevealPath
data.value: No existing path or parent folder is available for this record.

data.name: RecoveryCenterSelectRestorableFirst
data.value: Select a restorable recovery record first.

data.name: BatchSubtitle
data.value: Preview resize/convert settings, save presets, and export collision-safe copies.

data.name: BatchOutputFolderDefault
data.value: Output folder: Images batch output beside each source

data.name: BatchPreviewHint
data.value: Build a preview to see output paths and dimensions.

data.name: BatchDryRunHint
data.value: Dry run is on by default. Turn it off when the preview looks correct.

data.name: BatchReadyStatus
data.value: Ready. Add files or a folder to begin.

data.name: BatchCouldNotAddSource
data.value: Could not add that batch source.

data.name: BatchSettingsChanged
data.value: Settings changed. Build a new preview before running.

data.name: BatchAddSourcesBeforeRunning
data.value: Add supported source files before running a batch.

data.name: BatchAddSourcesBeforePreview
data.value: Add supported source files before building a preview.

data.name: BatchPresetReady
data.value: Preset ready. Build a preview to inspect output paths and dimensions.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupSubtitle
data.value: Local scan for exact duplicates and visually similar images. Nothing leaves this device.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupReferenceTooltip
data.value: Add a folder whose files should be preferred as keep candidates

data.name: DuplicateCleanupReferenceFoldersHint
data.value: Files in these folders are sorted first so cleanup actions keep them by default.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupThresholdHint
data.value: Lower values are stricter. Exact duplicates are always included.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupEmptyStateDescription
data.value: Images will group byte-identical files and visually similar images. Review side by side before moving extras to quarantine or the Recycle Bin.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupCompareAutomationName
data.value: Compare selected duplicate pair in viewer

data.name: DuplicateCleanupRecycleExtrasAutomationName
data.value: Move extra duplicate candidates to Recycle Bin

data.name: DuplicateCleanupHelpText
data.value: Cleanup actions target every candidate after the first one shown here.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupReadyStatus
data.value: Ready. Add one or more folders to scan.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupAddFolderBeforeScanning
data.value: Add at least one folder before scanning.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupScanningStatus
data.value: Scanning folders for exact duplicates and similar images...

data.name: DuplicateCleanupScanFailedSuffixFormat
data.value: {0} file or folder issue{1} was skipped.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupScanResultFormat
data.value: Scanned {0} file{1}. Found {2} exact group{3} and {4} similar pair{5}.{6}

data.name: DuplicateCleanupThresholdChanged
data.value: Threshold changed. Scan again to recompute similar-image findings.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupMarkedNotDuplicate
data.value: Finding marked not duplicate for this session.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupSelectFindingBeforeComparing
data.value: Select a duplicate or similar-image finding before comparing.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupCompareFileUnavailable
data.value: One of the selected compare files is no longer available.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupOpenedCompare
data.value: Opened selected pair in viewer compare mode.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupNoExtrasToQuarantine
data.value: No extra files are available to quarantine.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupQuarantineRecoveryDetailFormat
data.value: Moved duplicate candidate {0} to app-local quarantine batch {1}.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupQuarantineUnavailable
data.value: Quarantine storage is not available. No files were moved.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupNoExtrasToRecycle
data.value: No extra files are available to recycle.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupRecycleRecoveryDetailFormat
data.value: Sent duplicate candidate {0} to the Windows Recycle Bin.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupRecyclePartialFormat
data.value: Moved {0} file{1} to the Recycle Bin. {2} failed or was already missing.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupRecycleSuccessFormat
data.value: Moved {0} file{1} to the Recycle Bin.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupHelpTextSingleExtra
data.value: Cleanup actions target the extra candidate on the right.

data.name: DuplicateCleanupHelpTextMultipleExtrasFormat
data.value: Cleanup actions target {0} extra candidates after the keep candidate.
